x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Customer business rules and client scripts on HR case tables can conflict with Now Assist HRSD AI Agent actions. High customization counts increase deployment risk.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Review custom Business Rules and Client Scripts on sn_hr_core_case. Test Now Assist HRSD with all customizations enabled in sub-production. Consider deactivating redundant scripts before Now Assist go-live.
